PETITION FOR ORDER ACCEPTING RESIGNATION OF NORTHERN TRUST BANKS AS TRUSTEE OF TRUST B2, CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2005, GRANTED SUBJECT TO WRITTEN ORDER TO BE APPROVED AS TO FORM. FIRST REPUBLIC HAS CONSENTED TO ACT. MRS. ORVILLE WILL FILE THE CONSENT. NORTHERN TRUST BANK WAS NEVER THE TRUSTEE OF TRUST B1 AND SHALL NOT HAVE ANY RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE PIEDMONT HOUSE. THEY ARE THE SPECIAL TRUSTEE TO FILE THE TAX RETURN FOR 2004. THE COURT AFFIRMED THE ORDER FROM 04/04/05
